text.title: risk-management Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for risk-management as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Leaving risk owners blank in the agent-generated register for a human to fill in "later."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: "Later" rarely comes; unowned risks are reviewed by no one and their triggers go unmonitored. The agent should flag owner as "needs_assignment" in the output schema to force immediate assignment.
